LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a user's best score and game statistics.

userId.description: The unique Firebase UID of the user.

username.description: The display name of the user.

score.description: The highest score achieved by the user.

gamesPlayed.description: Total number of game sessions completed.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp (epoch) of the last score update.

/leaderboard/{userId}.description: Global rankings based on highest score per user.
